title: corydalis mira
intro: Corydalis mira, also known as the Chinese corydalis or yuteng san, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family, Papaveraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, due to the presence of alkaloids such as berberine and tetrandrine. The medicinal properties of Corydalis mira have been found to have various health benefits, including pain relief, anti-anxiety effects, and cardiovascular protection, making it a potential natural remedy for conditions such as arthritis and insomnia. In herbal preparations, Corydalis mira is often combined with other medicinal plants and used in the form of decoctions, tinctures, and capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
